data.title: UAE Tripples Holdings of BlackRock’s Spot Bitcoin ETF Amid Crypto Market Crash
data.description:
The United Arab Emirates has significantly increased its investment in BlackRock's Spot Bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF) in the midst of a dramatic downturn in the cryptocurrency market, reflecting a bold strategy to capitalize on potential opportunities even as digital asset prices face significant challenges.
source: https://blocknews.com/uae-tripples-holdings-blackrocks-spot-bitcoin-amid-crypto-market-crash/

data.title: MP Materials carves out strategic 49% JV with US Pentagon and Saudi to refine rare earths
data.description:
MP Materials said Wednesday it signed a new binding joint venture deal with the U. S. Department of Defense and Saudi Arabia’s Maaden to build a rare earth refinery inside the kingdom. MP and the Pentagon will share a 49% stake, while Maaden will hold no less than 51%, according to the company. The deal sent […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mp-materials-strategic-49-jv-pentagon-saudi/

data.title: Ethereum Slides Below $3,000 Again as Selling Pressure Accelerates
data.description:
Ethereum fell sharply on Tuesday, dropping 5. 8% over the past 24 hours and slipping below the $3,000 mark for the first time this month. The decline mirrors the broader market’s correction, but ETH’s technical indicators show a clearer loss of momentum that has traders watching key support zones closely
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ethereum-slides-below-3000-again-as-selling-pressure-accelerates/

data.title: UAE Tripples Holdings of BlackRock’s Spot Bitcoin ETF Amid Crypto Market Crash
data.description:
The United Arab Emirates has significantly increased its investments in BlackRock’s Spot Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) during a time of turmoil in the cryptocurrency market, where prices have plummeted and investor confidence has wavered. This strategic move reflects the UAE's commitment to bolstering its financial portfolio, even amidst economic uncertainty in the digital asset space.
source: https://blocknews.com/uae-tripples-holdings-of-blackrocks-spot-bitcoin-etf-amid-crypto-market-crash/

data.title: BTC-Backed Bond Breaks New Ground in New Hampshire — Here Is How It’s Reshaping Public Finance
data.description:
The groundbreaking BTC-backed bond initiative in New Hampshire represents a significant and innovative shift in the realm of public finance, introducing a novel approach that integrates cryptocurrency into traditional funding mechanisms. This initiative not only highlights the state's willingness to embrace emerging financial technologies but also sets a precedent for other regions to follow. By utilizing Bitcoin as a backing for municipal bonds, New Hampshire is paving the way for a more flexible and accessible financial landscape, potentially changing how public projects are financed and funded. As local governments explore the implications of this novel approach, it is clear that this movement could reshape the future of public finance, attracting new investors and redefining the relationship between municipalities and the digital economy.
source: https://blocknews.com/btc-backed-bond-breaks-new-ground-in-new-hampshire-here-is-how-its-reshaping-public-finance/

data.title: Fed chair candidate Kevin Hassett backs Trump’s $2000 tariff stimulus idea
data.description:
Kevin Hassett, one of Donald Trump’s finalists for Federal Reserve chair, said on Wednesday that Congress has room to consider $2,000 tariff rebate checks next year. He said this during a Bloomberg Economics event, and he made it clear he thinks tariff revenue is strong enough to support direct payments. Hassett, who runs the White […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kevin-hassett-backs-trumps-2000-stimulus/

data.title: XRP Drops 9% in 24 Hours as Selling Pressure Intensifies: Here’s What’s Behind the Move
data.description:
XRP slid 9% over the past 24 hours, sharply underperforming the broader crypto market’s 4. 8% daily decline. The token dropped to the $2. 02 zone, marking one of its weakest intraday performances this month as sentiment across the market deteriorated
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrp-drops-9-in-24-hours-as-selling-pressure-intensifies-heres-whats-behind-the-move/

data.title: U.S. Accounting Chief Targets Crypto Transfers: What Will It Mean for Your Balance Sheet?
